relative_variation.note: Purely mechanical. Relative variation of Ccl profile over eligible window sizes must be <= max_relative_variation.

resample_found_rate.note: Purely mechanical. Requires that resampling finds t* at least this fraction of runs for each shots value.

rationale: Adjusted max_relative_variation from 0.300 to 0.305 to avoid borderline false negatives on high-power datasets while preserving a strict stability gate. No changes to computation, only to the mechanical pass/fail threshold.
